calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2015 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-29-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Plaintiff, BOYAR NAITO, appearing on his own behalf.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) SYED ALMAN ALINAEEM.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Fia Race Centric, Bussiness entity; and Does 1- 10 dismissed without prejuedice.
Plaintiff sworn and examinded on his own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $40,643.40
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $0.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $40,643.40
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2014 Continued To Feb-24-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2014 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-18-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
